rule_details.description: setConnectTimeout(int) replaced by setConnectTimeout(Timeout) in HttpClient 5.x
setSocketTimeout(int) moved from RequestConfig to ConnectionConfig and changed to Timeout parameter in HttpClient 5.x
setSoTimeout(int) replaced by setSoTimeout(Timeout) in HttpClient 5.x
setConnectionTimeToLive(long, TimeUnit) replaced by setConnectionTimeToLive(TimeValue) in HttpClient 5.x; zero TTL now means connections are not reusable
closeExpiredConnections() renamed to closeExpired() and moved to ConnPoolControl in HttpClient 5.x
closeIdleConnections() renamed to closeIdle() and moved to ConnPoolControl in HttpClient 5.x
setDefaultSocketConfig() moved from HttpClientBuilder to PoolingHttpClientConnectionManagerBuilder in HttpClient 5.x
ManagedHttpClientConnection removed; use HttpCoreContext.getSSLSession() in HttpClient 5.x
PoolingHttpClientConnectionManager replaced by PoolingAsyncClientConnectionManager for async APIs
PoolingHttpClientConnectionManagerBuilder replaced by PoolingAsyncClientConnectionManagerBuilder for async APIs
Apache HttpClient 4.x artifact (org.apache.httpcomponents:httpclient) removed; replaced by org.apache.httpcomponents.client5:httpclient5
Apache HttpClient 4.x core artifact (org.apache.httpcomponents:httpcore) removed; replaced by org.apache.httpcomponents.core5:httpcore5
HttpClient 4.x async client classes (org.apache.http.impl.nio.client) moved to org.apache.hc.client5.http.impl.async in 5.x
HttpAsyncClients.custom() replaced by HttpAsyncClients.customHttp2() for HTTP/2-only async client in HttpClient 5.x
Apache HttpClient 4.x org.apache.http package replaced by org.apache.hc.* in HttpClient 5.x
HttpResponse.getStatusLine() removed in HttpClient 5.x; use ClassicHttpResponse.getCode() instead
ClientProtocolException removed in HttpClient 5.x; use HttpException instead
setCookieSpec(String) replaced by setCookieSpec(StandardCookieSpec) enum in HttpClient 5.x
Apache HttpClient 4.x (org.apache.http) package namespace replaced by org.apache.hc.httpclient5
BasicHttpContext replaced by HttpCoreContext or HttpClientContext in HttpClient 5.x
addInterceptorLast() replaced by addExecInterceptorFirst() with a name parameter in HttpClient 5.x
setRetryHandler() renamed to setRetryStrategy() in HttpClient 5.x
HttpCoreContext.HTTP_TARGET_HOST attribute access replaced by HttpClientContext.getHttpRoute().getTargetHost()
HttpEntityEnclosingRequest replaced by HttpEntityContainer in HttpClient 5.x
getAllHeaders() renamed to getHeaders() and moved to MessageHeaders interface in HttpClient 5.x
getRequestLine() removed in HttpClient 5.x; use new RequestLine(request) instead
HttpRequestBase replaced by HttpUriRequestBase in HttpClient 5.x
HttpResponse renamed to ClassicHttpResponse in HttpClient 5.x
RequestConfig.normalizeUri property removed; URIUtils.normalizeSyntax no longer public in HttpClient 5.x
CloseableHttpClient replaced by CloseableHttpAsyncClient when adopting async APIs
HttpClients.custom() replaced by HttpAsyncClients.custom() in the async migration path
HttpPost replaced by SimpleRequestBuilder.post() when using HttpClient 5.x simple async handlers
HttpGet replaced by SimpleRequestBuilder.get() when using HttpClient 5.x simple async handlers
EntityTemplate removed in HttpClient 5.x; replaced by HttpEntities.create()
setSSLSocketFactory() replaced by setTlsSocketStrategy() in HttpClient 5.x
